title: More Metals Mod
description: Adds a bunch of new metals and enjoyable stuff to the game.
body:
This mod introduces new metals to Minecraft and their applications, such as the Magnesium Lamp and Sodium Bomb.
## Sodium
This metal is obtained by smelting the Rock Salt ore and you can throw the ingots of this metal at mobs by right clicking and as soon as the ingots land in water, they explode. It can also be used to craft sodium block which explodes when it touches water. It can also be used to craft the Sodium TNT which can also explode in water when lighted.

![Sodium TNT Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d24c95d4a304e82fbce774b97e216ac82708b168.png)

## Magnesium
This metal is obtained by smelting the Dolomite ore. It can be used to craft Magnesium Lamp which can be used as a light source even in water and emits a bright white-blue light.

![Magnesium Lamp Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/23951b8980a0669041b6f7a5fa9726fbed7c34de.png)

## Bismuth
This is a very colorful metal which produces a sound like Amethyst.

## Titanium
This is a very strong and light metal. It can be used to craft armour which is really durable and strong and also gives you 1.25x jump boost.

## Uranium
This is a radioactive metal which can be used to craft a Nuclear Bomb which creates 100x more powerful explosion than a TNT and also gives nearby mobs Radiation Sickness.

![Nuclear Bomb Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6ac3542af32450b490e1daaafaa1c58530902adb.png)

## Mercury
This is a liquid metal which can be found in caves as lakes. Any mob that steps into mercury will get the Mercury Poisoning effect and die slowly.

## Metal Detector
This item can be used to detect nearby metals. Right click it to select the metal you want to detect and when you go nearby that metal ore with this item in your main-hand or off-hand it will start producing a sound which gets louder as you get closer to the metal ore.

![Metal Detector Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/32bfb490599265a52335c94054553e3a1712f9d9.png)
